instructions: Starheart is a sci-fi Campaign Scaffold supplement for Daggerheart, built under the Darrington Press Community Gaming License (DPCGL). This sheet supports all five Starheart entity types: PC, Adversary, Environment, Companion, and Vehicle. Use the tab strip at the top to switch between sheets. Domain card dropdowns auto-populate level, recall cost, and card text when a card is selected. Attack roll buttons target tokens and output Evasion, damage thresholds, and Hope/Fear/Critical result. No API required — compatible with free-tier Roll20.
